emotional_tone: Warm, tactile, authentic, organic, bohemian yet elegant. Evokes the magic of nature preserved in resin.

rules: Headings (H1, H2) MUST use Cormorant Garamond with tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Body text MUST use Outfit for high readability and modern contrast.
Overlines/Labels (like category tags) MUST be Uppercase, tiny (text-xs), wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]), and use Outfit.
H1 size should not exceed text-6xl. Ensure responsive typography using sm: and md: prefixes.
No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Use #F9F6F0 as the main app background to give a warm sand/paper feel.
Use #2C402B (Deep Forest Green) for primary CTAs and major headings.
Hover states for buttons must explicitly declare text color (e.g., hover:bg-[#1E2D1E] hover:text-white).
For text over images, use a gradient overlay, never a flat blanket overlay. Max opacity 50%.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the natural elements to breathe. Use p-8 to p-16 for sections.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for the Story/About sections to create an editorial, asymmetric feel. Mix wide and tall images.
spacing_and_layout.product_grid: Clean, optical alignment. Large images (aspect-square or aspect-[4/5]).
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

surfaces_and_components.buttons: Flat design, rounded-none or rounded-sm. No heavy drop shadows. Primary color background, white text.
surfaces_and_components.cards_and_products: Cardless approach preferred. If using cards, use 1px solid border (border-border) with no shadow. Image zooms slightly on hover.
surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-[#F9F6F0]/80, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-[#2C402B]/10. Must remain readable.
surfaces_and_components.footer: High contrast shift. Dark theme for footer: bg-[#2C402B] text-[#F9F6F0]. Generous vertical padding (py-20).
surfaces_and_components.modals_drawers: Use Shadcn Sheet for the Shopping Cart drawer. Use Dialog for Quick View if needed.

navigation.desktop: Visible links (Inicio, Catálogo, Historia, Contacto). No hamburger on desktop. Cart icon with badge.
navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu triggering a Shadcn Sheet or mobile full-screen overlay.

ecommerce_flow.catalog: Filters for categories (Anillos, Aretes, Collares, Pulseras, Dijes). Sticky sidebar or top horizontal scroll for categories.
ecommerce_flow.product_page: Split layout: 50% sticky product info (right), 50% large scrollable images (left).
ecommerce_flow.cart: Drawer-based (Shadcn Sheet). Shows product thumbnail, name, qty adjust, and total.
ecommerce_flow.checkout: Mock PayPal integration button at the bottom of the cart drawer or dedicated checkout page.
ecommerce_flow.admin_panel: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) strictly for functional admin clarity. White bg, dense tables (Shadcn Table) for products and orders.

hero_backgrounds.usage: Main Hero Background. Apply a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2C402B]/80 to-transparent) to ensure the white/gold text is legible.
hero_backgrounds.description: A drop of golden resin on weathered wood

hero_backgrounds.usage: Storytelling section background or secondary banner.
hero_backgrounds.description: Textured bark of a tree, covered in moss.

product_examples.description: Gold and silver round botanical pendant
Silver and purple botanical heart pendant
Silver and black round botanical pendant

storytelling_artisan.usage: About Us / Artisan Story section image. Shows the crafting process.
storytelling_artisan.description: Wood carving tools and shavings on a workbench

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes, strictly follow the provided color hex codes in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').
For the e-commerce state, use React Context or a lightweight state manager (Zustand) to manage the cart globally.
Admin routes should be protected. Mock the login with a simple hardcoded credential for demonstration.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric. Add slight padding to text next to icons to balance it visually.
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for marketing sections; use raw HTML/Tailwind for bento grids to allow asymmetric overlapping.
Implement the shopping cart as a Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) opening from the right side.
Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner.
